title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
author: Mark Manson
description: Master the counterintuitive approach to living a good life with 4 practical skills for choosing better values and embracing limitations.
longDescription: Mark Manson's brutally honest guide argues that improving our lives hinges not on our ability to turn lemons into lemonade, but on learning to stomach lemons better. These skills help you identify what truly matters, take ownership of your problems, embrace uncertainty, and practice the art of saying no — all grounded in the book's core philosophy that we must choose our struggles wisely.
